positive: A symmetrical, centralized design featuring bioluminescent flora intertwined with celestial cosmic structures. The central subject is a stylized, abstract lunar portal opening into a vibrant nebula, framed by oversized, geometric lotus petals and crystalline vines. The overall style is Neo-Art Deco meets Mystical Realism, rendered with strong, graphic linework and silhouettes. Use a palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, iridescent violet, and hints of luminous emerald green. High contrast, volumetric lighting emphasizing glowing edges, suitable for repeating seamless textile prints. Highly detailed, clean, and symbolic composition.
